question: Advisory: Grape powdery mildew?
answer: Grape powdery mildew. Dense canopy and dry mild weather favor powdery mildew; sulfur sprays early.

question: Advisory: Tur pod borer ETL?
answer: Tur pod borer ETL. ETL ~5% pods damaged; install bird perches 10-12/acre.

question: Advisory: Banana bunch care?
answer: Banana bunch care. Propping and denavelling improve bunch quality; remove male bud.

question: Advisory: Mango hopper flowering?
answer: Mango hopper flowering. Monitor at panicle emergence; avoid heavy nitrogen before flowering.

question: कांदा पीक माहिती काय आहे?
answer: Crop Onion (कांदा). Season: Rabi / Late Kharif. Soil: Friable Sandy Loam, Well Drained Clay Loam. Pests: Thrips, Onion Fly. Diseases: Purple Blotch, Stemphylium Blight, Downy Mildew. Source: ICAR-DOGR open advisory.

question: गहू पीक माहिती काय आहे?
answer: Crop Wheat (गहू). Season: Rabi. Soil: Loam, Clay Loam. Pests: Aphids, Termites. Diseases: Rust, Karnal Bunt, Powdery Mildew. Source: ICAR-IIWBR open advisory.

question: भुईमूग पीक माहिती काय आहे?
answer: Crop Groundnut (भुईमूग). Season: Kharif / Summer. Soil: Sandy Loam, Red Soil. Pests: Leaf Miner, Aphids. Diseases: Tikra Leaf Spot, Rust, Collar Rot. Source: ICAR-DGR open advisory.

question: टोमॅटो पीक माहिती काय आहे?
answer: Crop Tomato (टोमॅटो). Season: Rabi / Summer. Soil: Sandy Loam, Well-drained Loam. Pests: Fruit Borer, Whitefly, Leaf Miner. Diseases: Early Blight, Late Blight, Leaf Curl Virus. Source: ICAR-IIVR open advisory.

question: बाजरी पीक माहिती काय आहे?
answer: Crop Bajra (Pearl Millet) (बाजरी). Season: Kharif. Soil: Sandy Loam, Light Soil. Pests: Shoot Fly, White Grub. Diseases: Downy Mildew, Ergot. Source: ICAR-AICRP Millet open advisory.

question: बटाटा पीक माहिती काय आहे?
answer: Crop Potato (बटाटा). Season: Rabi. Soil: Sandy Loam, Well-drained Loam. Pests: Aphids, Cutworm. Diseases: Late Blight, Early Blight, Black Scurf. Source: ICAR-CPRI open advisory.

question: How do I manage Yellow Mosaic Virus in Soybean?
answer: Yellow Mosaic Virus on Soybean. Symptoms: Yellow mosaic patterns on leaves; stunting; reduced pod set.. Organic: Resistant varieties; whitefly control with yellow sticky traps; neem oil.. Chemical: Manage whitefly vectors with recommended insecticides early..

question: पिवळा मोझॅक नियंत्रण कसे करावे?
answer: पानांवर पिवळे चित्ते; वाढ खुंटणे; शेंगा कमी.

question: How do I manage Rice Blast in Rice?
answer: Rice Blast on Rice. Symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions on leaves; neck rot at panicle base.. Organic: Resistant varieties; balanced N; silicon amendments.. Chemical: Tricyclazole 0.6g/L or Isoprothiolane per recommendation..

question: How do I manage Tomato Leaf Curl Virus in Tomato?
answer: Tomato Leaf Curl Virus on Tomato. Symptoms: Upward leaf curling; yellowing; stunting; poor fruiting.. Organic: Virus-free seedlings; whitefly nets; reflective mulch.. Chemical: Vector management with imidacloprid/spiromesifen carefully..

answer: Soybean moisture stress. Critical irrigation at flowering and pod filling if dry spell exceeds 10 days.

question: What is the Kisan Credit Card (KCC) government scheme?
answer: Kisan Credit Card (KCC). Benefits: Short-term crop loan at concessional interest with interest subvention.. Eligibility: Farmers, tenant farmers, SHGs with agri activity.. Portal: https://www.nabard.org

question: What is the Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Shetkari Karjamukti Yojana (reference) government scheme?

question: What is the guidance for Drip irrigation scheduling?
answer: Drip irrigation scheduling. Estimate ETc = ETo x Kc; run drip to replace 100% ETc in peak; reduce 20-30% in cool cloudy periods. Pulse irrigation on sandy soils.

question: What is the guidance for Pomegranate stress for bahar?
answer: Pomegranate stress for bahar. Withhold water 30-45 days then resume with fertigation to force uniform bahar.

question: What is the guidance for Sugarcane grand growth water?
answer: Sugarcane grand growth water. Peak water demand in grand growth; mulching reduces evaporation.

question: How do I manage Wheat Rust in Wheat?
answer: Wheat Rust on Wheat. Symptoms: Orange-brown pustules on leaves and stems.. Organic: Resistant cultivars; early sowing where advised.. Chemical: Propiconazole 1ml/L at first pustules..

question: How do I manage Pod Borer (Helicoverpa) in Tur (Pigeon Pea)?
answer: Pod Borer (Helicoverpa) on Tur (Pigeon Pea). Symptoms: Holes in pods; larvae feed on developing seeds.. Organic: NPV, HaNPV; bird perches; pheromone traps.. Chemical: Indoxacarb or Emamectin as per ETL..

question: Describe Sandy Loam and suitable crops.
answer: Sandy Loam. Good drainage; needs organic matter and frequent irrigation. Suitable crops: Groundnut, Potato, Onion, Grapes, Chilli.

question: Describe Clay Loam and suitable crops.
answer: Clay Loam. High nutrient holding; careful drainage needed in monsoon. Suitable crops: Rice, Wheat, Cotton, Sugarcane.

question: What fertilizer should I apply for Pomegranate?
answer: NPK per acre for Pomegranate: N=35, P=25, K=25. Basal: FYM + full P,K and 1/3 N at bahar.. Top dressing: Remaining N in 2-3 fertigation splits.. Micronutrients: Boron and zinc foliar as needed..

question: What fertilizer should I apply for Banana?
answer: NPK per acre for Banana: N=80, P=30, K=100. Basal: High K demand; split monthly.. Top dressing: Monthly N and K splits.. Micronutrients: Fe and Zn foliar..
